title: Things to Do - Visit Union Square SF
content: ## Things to Do. rows of colorful tulips line Union Square Plaza on Tulip Day. ## Ride a cable car with someone from. Check out one-of-a-kind events to plan your next Union Square adventure! For one day a year, Union Square is transformed into a blooming field of 80,000 FREE Dutch tulips to celebrate the start of Union Square In Bloom. ### Experience Union Square In Bloom. Start your day at **One65**, a French patisserie in Union Square. A day in Union Square wouldn’t be complete without a ride on one of **San Francisco’s famous cable cars**, where, as Tony Bennett aptly sang, ‘To be where little cable cars climb halfway to the stars.’ Hop on at the Powell & Market Street Cable Car turnaround, the gateway to the City. After a day of exploring the city, there’s no better way to warm yourself up than with a delicious Italian dinner.
